description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a sprawling, L-shaped footprint, surrounded by a low fence and landscaped with bushes and trees at the corners. The roof is a combination of gable and hip forms, finished in a dark color, contrasting with the light exterior walls. The front facade features a central entrance, flanked by large windows and a small porch area, while the rear side has multiple glass doors and windows opening to the backyard. The property includes a paved driveway and walkway leading to the main entrance, and the yard is neatly divided into front and back sections. The windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with some grouped together and others spaced apart. The overall style is modern suburban, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped bungalow with a dark gabled roof, light exterior walls, large windows, and landscaped front and back yards enclosed by a low fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, central porch, large front windows, and landscaped yard with a driveway and bushes.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the side fence, with less visible window detail.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying multiple glass doors and windows opening to the backyard, with trees and a more private, open yard area.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side yard, additional windows, and a tree at the corner, with the fence enclosing the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped and individual windows on all facades
